metadata.title: No Regulatory Guidance Content — File Identified as FDA Project ASIATICA Webpage (Chinese Language)
metadata.document_date: Unknown (references 2020 US Census, 2021 and 2023 Cancer Dialogue events)
metadata.extraction_note: CRITICAL MISLABELING: The filename '34-real-world-evidence.pdf' does not contain any FDA real-world evidence (RWE) regulatory guidance. The PDF contains exactly 2 pages: (1) A Chinese-language webpage for FDA's 'Project ASIATICA' (亞裔項目) from the FDA Oncology Center of Excellence (OCE), describing an initiative to advocate for cancer awareness among Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AA & NHPI) communities; and (2) a blank white page. There are zero regulatory rules, requirements, or guidance provisions extractable from this document. No rules array entries are produced. If a genuine FDA real-world evidence guidance is needed for training, the correct document is: 'Use of Real-World Evidence to Support Regulatory Decision-Making for Medical Devices' (FDA, August 2017) or 'Real-World Data: Assessing Registries to Support Regulatory Decision-Making for Drug and Biological Products' (FDA, September 2021) or the 21st Century Cures Act Section 3022 framework guidance. The file in the training set should be replaced with the correct RWE guidance PDF.
